data.title: Xplode, a fair launch platform based on BSC, is now online, supporting lossless exit after launch
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Xplode, the BSC-based Fair Launch platform, is now officially launched. The platform is committed to building a fair and reliable token issuance ecosystem for users.
During the platform's internal trading and the token's official launch trading process, users do not need to worry about additional trading losses. Xplode ensures the safety and smoothness of the transaction process.

data.title: Backed Now Launches Tokenized Coinbase Stock wbCOIN
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Backed, a real-world asset tokenization issuer, announced on the X platform that it has launched the tokenized Coinbase stock wbCOIN on the Base network. Users can exchange through CoWSwap, and liquidity comes from Aerodrome.
The wbCOIN/USDC trading pair is now online, with 1:1 support, free transferability, and a legitimate COIN stock value claim. In addition, Backed clarified that "we have no connection with Coinbase. We just like this stock."

data.title: PNut's owner recently adopted a miniature dachshund named Howard
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News PNut's owner Mark Longo has found love again four months after New York bureaucrats slaughtered the famous squirrel. Mark Longo said he recently adopted a miniature dachshund named Howard and believes the puppy "may be" the reincarnation of his beloved squirrel PNut. "Seeing him running around outside and being best friends with cats reminds me of PNut." Mark Longo, 34, and his wife Daniela Bittner, 28, decided to adopt Howard from a neighbor two weeks ago, although they had hesitated. "This has been an emotional time for me and my family... I have been hesitant to get a new pet because of what happened. I am uncertain." They are still mourning PNut, who was cruelly taken away by New York State Department of Environmental Conservation workers in a raid on his Long Island home and animal shelter on October 30. Because the state claimed to test it for rabies, and the rabies test required decapitation because PNut bit the hand of one of the workers during the incident.

data.title: A trader spent 172.2 ETH to buy 22.3 million Cocoro, and the value has risen to 2 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a trader spent 172.2 ETH (worth approximately US$365,200) to buy 22.3 million Cocoro, and the current value has risen to approximately US$2 million.

data.title: willjeetonyou.eth bought 14.83 million Cocoro and made a profit of over 1 million US dollars in a short period of time
data.description: According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, willjeetonyou.eth used 21 ETH to buy 14.83 million Cocoro at an average price of $0.003 within 2 minutes after the Cocoro deployer added liquidity. He currently holds 13.88 million Cocoro, worth $1.11 million. He made a profit of $1.14 million on Cocoro in one hour.

data.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent Says US Should Take Worldwide Lead in Crypto, Strive To ‘Bring It Onshore’
data.description:
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says that the US should become a global leader in digital assets. In a new interview with CNBC, Bessent says the United States should welcome crypto-related businesses into the country and take a leadership role in the industry. “I am a big proponent of the US taking the worldwide lead in […]
The post Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent Says US Should Take...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/08/treasury-secretary-scott-bessent-says-us-should-take-worldwide-lead-in-crypto-strive-to-bring-it-onshore/

data.title: NFP announces the launch of a token destruction plan to promote sustainable development of the ecosystem
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, AI+Web3 creation platform NFPrompt officially launched the NFP token destruction plan today. The core goal of this destruction plan is to reduce the circulation of tokens, increase token scarcity, optimize the economic model, and enhance long-term ecological value.
The team said that this move is the first stage of ecological optimization, and will gradually disclose DAO governance upgrades and application scenario expansion to form a sustainable token economic cycle.
NFP is currently quoted at $0.094, with a 24-hour full-network transaction volume of $4.5 million. For more updates, please follow the official announcement channel.

data.title: Crypto industry's "political gamble" of $130 million in donations in exchange for Trump's support
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump said at the Cryptocurrency Summit that the U.S. federal government will support the development of cryptocurrencies represented by Bitcoin and the digital asset market. U.S. media reported that Trump's policy shift may be due to the huge political donations provided by cryptocurrency investors during last year's U.S. election, and they expect him to end the Biden administration's restrictive policies on cryptocurrencies after he takes office. According to the Wall Street Journal, during last year's U.S. election campaign, the cryptocurrency industry provided more than $130 million in political donations to bipartisan candidates for the Senate and House of Representatives who support cryptocurrency through super political action committees. (Jinshi)
